ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, NOT(ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Draft" )), OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(VATPercent__c )), ISBLANK(TEXT(TermsOfPayment2__c )), ISBLANK(TEXT( InvoiceReceiver__r.AccountLanguage__c )) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Account Data is missing. Please check for Account Language, VAT %, Terms of Payment etc. (IN018)
